headline: Sarawak Renewable Energy Target Set at 70% by 2030
context: Sarawak Premier announced target of 70% renewable energy generation by 2030 leveraging the state 28,000MW hydropower potential.

cards.big: Sarawak targets 70% renewable energy by 2030 from hydropower
cards.sub: State already generates 65% from hydro but wants to add solar and biomass

cards.big: Sarawak Energy invested RM2.4 billion in solar farms across 5 districts
cards.sub: Combined capacity of 800MW would supplement hydropower during dry seasons

cards.big: Hydrogen production facility in Bintulu aims for 5,000 tonnes by 2028
cards.sub: Green hydrogen from hydro-powered electrolysis targets Japanese and Korean buyers

cards.big: Carbon credit sales from Sarawak forests generated RM180 million in 2025
cards.sub: State claims credit for 6 million hectares of protected forest under REDD+

cards.big: Renewable targets test whether energy transition creates local benefit or only export revenue
70% renewable energy by 2030 — Sarawak's target exceeds the national commitment by 30 points.
